---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new calculator, method, or capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the calculator, method, or feature.

**Why / use case**
What problem does it solve?

**Formula / source (for a new calculator or method)**
Link the published formula or paper, and the population it was validated on. Calculators in
this project are pinned to published reference values, so a citable source is important.

**Additional context**
Anything else — examples, prior art, alternatives considered.
